title: Refine Program section to invited-talks template
objective: Update the homepage Program section so it describes a full-day workshop template built around invited talks, poster sessions, and coffee/lunch breaks only.
instructions: Edit the Program section in index.html.
Replace the current generic agenda copy with a concise full-day workshop template that mentions only invited talks, poster sessions, coffee breaks, and a lunch break.
Do not mention lightning talks, panel discussions, tutorials, or named speakers.
Keep the section labeled Program and preserve the existing single-page structure.
constraints: Do not perform any git operations.
Limit scope to the Program section content unless a minimal formatting tweak is required for readability.
expected_outputs: Homepage Program section describes the invited-talks and posters template agenda.
definition_of_done: Program copy mentions only invited talks, poster sessions, coffee breaks, and a lunch break.
No disallowed session types remain in the Program section.
ResultPacket lists changed artifacts and doc implications.
